items.desc_en: Anthropic said the broad release is possible because of new safeguards that block responses in specific high-risk areas.
items.desc_zh: Anthropic 表示，由于新的保障措施阻止了特定高风险区域的响应，因此广泛发布是可能的。

items.title_en: EU orders Meta to open WhatsApp to rival AI chatbots

items.desc_zh: Meta 指责欧盟“监管越权”，并表示其决定将允许 OpenAI 等科技巨头免费使用 WhatsApp。

items.title_en: Israeli air strikes hit Lebanese city of Tyre despite Iranian warning to stop attacks

items.desc_zh: 伊朗周一警告以色列，如果不停止对其黎巴嫩盟友真主党的袭击，伊朗可能会恢复敌对行动。

items.desc_en: The flagship partnership project became a glaring example of discord between the two nations.
items.desc_zh: 这一旗舰伙伴关系项目成为两国之间不和的一个明显例子。

items.title_zh: 11 岁莱哈娜 (Lyhanna) 被杀激怒法国并激怒政府
items.desc_en: Protesters are angry that the suspect had already been reported to police last August in a separate case.
items.desc_zh: 抗议者对嫌疑人去年八月在另一起案件中向警方报案感到愤怒。

items.title_en: I have right papers and visa - barred referee Artan
items.title_zh: 我有正确的文件和签证 - 被禁止的裁判 Artan
items.desc_en: Somali referee Omar Artan says he was subjected to an 11-hour immigration interview before being denied entry to the United States for the World Cup despite holding the "right papers" and "right visa"
items.desc_zh: 索马里裁判奥马尔·阿尔坦表示，尽管他持有“正确的文件”和“正确的签证”，但在被拒绝进入美国观看世界杯之前，他接受了长达 11 个小时的移民面试

items.title_en: Vinted boss sees 'fundamental' shift in consumer patterns, as secondhand firm notches $9 billion valuation

items.desc_en: Vinted is seeing a structural shift in consumer behaviour as habits form around the resale economy, its marketplace CEO told CNBC.
items.desc_zh: Vinted 市场首席执行官告诉 CNBC，随着转售经济习惯的形成，消费者行为发生了结构性转变。

items.desc_zh: Thoma Bravo 创始人 Orlando Bravo 表示，人工智能为软件公司提供了“巨大的推动力”。
